prompt_used: Story: Midnight Lockbox (midnight-lockbox) | Hook: A self-storage unit with no renter sends voice memos predicting what your team will do next. | Subgenre: supernatural mystery | Tone: GROUNDED | Location: Gallowglass 24-hour storage facility and storm-drain service tunnels | Villain: The Quartermaster | Villain worldview: Storage is memory, and memory belongs to whoever controls access. | Motifs: unit tags, bolt cutters, time-lock stickers. Build unique voice profile for Night Manager Eli Mercer. Baseline emotion=ANXIOUS. Motivations=Keep his family uninvolved. Include cadence notes and emotional shifts for suspicion, trust, and panic states.
